hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *"/frontend/"*) cd /home/Shakomba/Projects/Attendance-Management-System && docker compose build frontend && docker compose up -d frontend ;; *"/backend/"*|*"/demo_data/"*) cd /home/Shakomba/Projects/Attendance-Management-System && docker compose build backend && docker compose up -d backend ;; esac
